$comment: D-CSUBSET-VLA C1b CRITICAL-A: a LEAF VLA function whose length comes from a >16-byte by-value struct PARAMETER received on the incoming stack. Proves the last fixed-frame base-switch site (`recv_by_value_stack_param`) addresses off the frame pointer, not the moved SP — and is RED-ON-DISABLE for both that switch and the completeness verifier (reverting the site to SP makes the verifier reject this at compile time). The arm64 leg witnesses the struct-param frame path under the real extended-register SUB-sp on qemu. exitCode 42 = a[5]=35 + a[1]=7.
